2606.19759.title: Optimal Scheduling in a Question-Answering Forum of Knowledge Workers
2606.19759.paper_summary: As individuals turn to the Internet to find answers to questions they may have, several Question Answering (QA) forums have evolved, where users knowledgeable in certain topics can contribute their expertise to answering these requests for information. While these are currently volunteer based, we consider a future version employing knowledge workers who are experts in certain topics. In such a system, the request-answer processes forming the queuing system may utilize schedulers that assign requests in different topics to the experts in the forum, who may be able to answer them according to their expertise levels in different topics. With this model, we calculate the capacity of the system for handling the requests while keeping the system stable, and design schedulers that achieve capacity. We also investigate how collaboration between experts in answering requests can potentially increase capacity.
2606.19759.paper_summary_zh: 隨著個體轉向互聯網尋找他們可能有的問題的答案，幾個問答（QA）論壇已經發展起來，讓熟悉某些主題的用戶能夠貢獻他們的專業知識來回答這些資訊請求。雖然這些目前是基於志願者的，但我們考慮未來版本將聘用在某些主題上具專業知識的知識工作者。在這樣的系統中，形成排隊系統的請求-回答過程可能會利用調度器，將不同主題的請求分配給論壇中的專家，他們可能根據自己在不同主題上的專業水平來回答這些請求。通過這個模型，我們計算系統處理請求的能力，同時保持系統的穩定性，並設計能夠達到容量的調度器。我們還調查了專家之間在回答請求時的合作如何可能增加容量。
2606.19759.author: Rohit Negi et.al.
